headline: Strong improvement: 45s faster (0s / 600 FLS)

progression_insights.description: Fatigue crashes detected after ~3 consecutive attempts
progression_insights.recommendation: Limit sessions to 2 scored attempts, then rest.

strengths: Excellent demonstration of proper needle loading technique
Good instrument ergonomics and tissue handling
Clear visualization of both simple and running suture techniques
Drain not avulsed — safe tissue handling maintained
next_session_plan: Good to continue — aim for 3-4 scored attempts next session. Consider recording with direct camera for highest scoring confidence.
